---
title: "Evidence"
subtitle: "A render-time summary of checked-in validation artifacts."
sidebar: false
---

The table below is generated when the site renders. It reads checked-in fixtures and manifests instead of repeating their status by hand.

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from pathlib import Path
import json

cwd = Path.cwd()
if (cwd / "pyproject.toml").exists():
    root = cwd
elif (cwd.parent / "pyproject.toml").exists():
    root = cwd.parent
else:
    root = cwd

artifacts = [
    ("Golden reference", root / "tests" / "fixtures" / "golden_reference_v1.json"),
    ("Tier A stimulus manifest", root / "tests" / "stimuli" / "tier_a" / "manifest.json"),
    ("Tier A alignment manifest", root / "tests" / "benchmarks" / "manifests" / "tier_a_alignment_manifest.json"),
    ("Alignment quality gate", root / "tests" / "benchmarks" / "thresholds" / "alignment_quality_gate.json"),
]

print("| Artifact | Status | Detail |")
print("|---|---:|---|")
for label, path in artifacts:
    if not path.exists():
        print(f"| {label} | missing | `{path.relative_to(root)}` |")
        continue
    detail = ""
    try:
        payload = json.loads(path.read_text())
        if isinstance(payload, dict):
            detail = ", ".join(sorted(payload.keys())[:5])
        elif isinstance(payload, list):
            detail = f"{len(payload)} records"
    except Exception:
        detail = "present"
    print(f"| {label} | present | `{path.relative_to(root)}` {detail} |")
```

## Local gates

The docs slice should be reviewed with:

```bash
uv run pytest -q
uv run python scripts/release_check.py
uv run python scripts/validate_tier_a_stimuli.py
cd docs && make quarto
```
